# Kotlin compiler warning baseline
# Each line is a fixed string that is matched against compiler warning lines (lines starting with "w: ").
# Warnings matching any entry here are considered known/accepted and do not fail the build.
# To add a new accepted warning, append its stable identifier below.
# To enforce that a warning is gone, remove its entry — CI will pass only once no output matches it.

# KLIB resolver duplicate unique_name warnings:
# These are emitted because Compose Multiplatform bundles its own copies of several
# AndroidX KLIBs (annotation, collection, lifecycle-*, runtime, savedstate), which
# conflict with the direct AndroidX dependencies pulled in transitively.
# Tracked upstream: https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-58551
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=annotation_commonMain'
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=collection_commonMain'
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=lifecycle-common_commonMain'
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=lifecycle-runtime-compose_commonMain'
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=lifecycle-runtime_commonMain'
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=lifecycle-viewmodel-savedstate_commonMain'
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=lifecycle-viewmodel_commonMain'
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=runtime-saveable_commonMain'
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=runtime_commonMain'
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=savedstate-compose_commonMain'
KLIB resolver: The same 'unique_name=savedstate_commonMain'
